remember: Students will be able to recall the concept of environment and natural resources, their significance, and relationship between environment and development.
Students will be able to identify the different types of natural resources and their distribution across the globe.
Students will be able to explain the concept of sustainable development and its importance.
understand: Students will be able to understand the impact of human activities on the environment and natural resources.
Students will be able to comprehend the role of institutions and governance in managing natural resources.
Students will be able to analyze the relationship between economic growth, social development, and environmental protection.
apply: Students will be able to apply the concept of sustainable development to real-world scenarios and policy-making.
Students will be able to analyze the effectiveness of different institutions and policies in managing natural resources.
Students will be able to suggest measures to mitigate the impact of human activities on the environment and natural resources.
analyze: Students will be able to analyze the pros and cons of different approaches to managing natural resources.
Students will be able to evaluate the impact of globalization on environmental degradation and natural resource management.
Students will be able to compare and contrast different models of sustainable development and their applicability to different contexts.

ncert_objectives: To understand the concept of environment and its relationship with development.
To analyze the impact of human activities on the environment and natural resources.
To evaluate the role of institutions and governance in managing natural resources.
board_exam_objectives: To explain the concept of sustainable development and its importance.
To discuss the impact of human activities on the environment and natural resources.
To analyze the relationship between economic growth, social development, and environmental protection.
To evaluate the effectiveness of different institutions and policies in managing natural resources.
